title: hydrocotyle longipes
intro: Hydrocotyle longipes, also known as the 'Running Coconut' or 'Long-stalked Pennywort', is a species of aquatic plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle longipes include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and infusions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
